case_title: PALENZONA CAROL ANN C/O BRADLEY L BACKEBERG VS LYONS LEILA IND DBA LYONS LTD ANTIQUE PRINTS

docket_entries.description: MAILING ON SUB SERVG.NOT DONE TIMELY.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LYONS LEILA IND DBA LYONS LTD ANTIQUE PRINTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PALENZONA CAROL ANN C/O BRADLEY L BACKEBERG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
